# Jace AI

> AI Registry entry [AIR-42](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-42/jace-ai) — status **Monitor** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI Email Assistant / Executive Productivity
**Cost:** $25/$20 Plus; $50/$40 Pro; Custom Enterprise
**Departments:** TBD

## Overview

AI-powered executive email assistant. Sits on top of inbox, organises emails, drafts responses, executes email-triggered workflows. Claims 2 hours/day saved. "AI Chief of Staff" — learns user style and company context.

## Capabilities

* AI email drafts in user's writing style
* Smart Rules — custom automation (auto-CC, templates, calendar)
* AI Labels — automatic categorisation/priority sorting
* Business Integrations — email-triggered actions to other tools
* AI Chief of Staff chat interface
* Email history search (up to 3 years on Pro)
* Multi-inbox (2 Plus, 8 Pro)
* Custom integrations + MCP support (Pro)

## Security

* **SOC 2 Type 1 only — NOT Type 2** (less rigorous)
* CASA Tier 3
* Encryption in transit/at rest
* No training on user data (stated)
* 99.9% uptime claim

## Considerations

* SOC 2 Type 1 only — Type II expected for enterprise
* No SSO/SAML mentioned
* Email access is HIGHLY sensitive — reads all incoming/outgoing
* "AI Chief of Staff" accessing years of history raises data governance questions
* Native Gmail/Outlook AI features improving rapidly — compare

*Monitor. Tracking for competitive awareness.*
